user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to add a new posting channel, so that vacancies can be published to the right channel
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Posting Channel screen; When I click Add new posting channel and enter its name, channel, type and posting mode; Then the channel is created and listed

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to view and edit a posting channel, so that I can review or update its configuration
acceptance_criteria: Given a posting channel is listed; When I click View or Edit; Then I can review or modify its Name, Channel, Type, Posting mode and Applicability

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to refresh the posting channel list, so that I see the latest channels
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Posting Channel screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current data
